## Proposal

Describe the feature.

## Use Case

Explain how this improves read-only structure intelligence or developer infrastructure.

## Suggested API or CLI Shape

```text
Optional sketch here.
```

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] This remains read-only and observational.
- [ ] This does not add remote fetching, browser actions, workflow execution, form submission, challenge solving, or bypass behavior.
- [ ] This can be tested with synthetic fixtures.
- [ ] Documentation and schema impacts are described.
